audit_status.source_base: Greek Revelation text tradition with Exodus/bowl judgment imagery; draft aligned later
audit_status.review_note: Compact complete draft reviewed for seven bowls, unrepentance, Armageddon, Babylon remembered.

verses.restored: I heard great voice from temple saying to seven messengers: Go and pour out seven bowls of wrath of Divine into earth.
The first went and poured his bowl upon earth; a harmful and painful sore came upon humans having mark of beast and worshiping its image.
The second poured into sea; it became like blood/life of dead one, and every living soul/life in sea died.
The third poured into rivers and springs of waters, and they became blood/life.
I heard messenger of waters saying: Righteous/just are you, the One who is and who was, the Holy One, because you judged these things,
because they poured out blood/life of holy ones and prophets, and blood/life you have given them to drink; they are worthy.
And I heard altar saying: Yes, Lord Divine Almighty, true and righteous/just are your judgments.
The fourth poured bowl upon sun, and it was given to scorch humans with fire.
Humans were scorched with great heat and blasphemed name of Divine having authority over these plagues, and they did not turn to give him glory.
The fifth poured bowl upon throne of beast, and its reign became darkened, and they gnawed their tongues from pain.
They blasphemed Divine of heaven because of their pains and sores, and did not turn from their works.
The sixth poured bowl upon great river Euphrates, and its water was dried, so way of kings from sunrise might be prepared.
I saw from mouth of dragon, beast, and false prophet three unclean spirits like frogs.
For they are spirits of daimons doing signs, going out to kings of whole inhabited world to gather them into war of great day of Divine Almighty.
Look, I come like thief. Blessed is the one keeping awake and keeping garments, so that one may not walk naked and they see one's shame.
And they gathered them into place called in Hebrew Harmagedon.
The seventh poured bowl upon air, and great voice came from temple from throne, saying: It has happened.
Flashes, voices, thunders happened, and great shaking such as had not happened since human came upon earth.
The great city became into three parts, cities of nations fell, and Babylon the great was remembered before Divine, to give her cup of wine of wrath of his anger.
Every island fled, and mountains were not found.
Great hail like talent-weight came down from heaven upon humans, and humans blasphemed Divine because of plague of hail, for its plague is very great.

translation_notes: Bowls echo Exodus plagues and expose hardened refusal to turn.
Armageddon/Harmagedon is symbolic battle-gathering language; avoid modern war mapping.
Unclean frog-like spirits are propaganda/sign-working imagery from dragon/beast/false prophet mouths.
safety_note: Do not literalize bowls for fear prediction or military fantasies. The moral focus is hardened allegiance to beast/Babylon systems and refusal to turn.
